name: Blueberry Breakfast Cake, the Best!
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the flour, baking powder and salt.
2. Cut in the shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Combine eggs with milk.
4. Combine flour mixture with wet ingredients. Fold in blueberries gently into batter.
5. Grease a loaf pan.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for one hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
